feedback.details: Diagram validates successfully with mmdc (exit 0). Contains exactly 7 required container nodes: llm-switch (line 20), consul-agent (line 22), vault-agent (line 23), nomad-client (line 24), qwen-local (line 28), nemotron-local (line 29), frontier-api-gateway (line 30). Plus ai-app as external entity (line 33). All 8 relationships labeled with protocols (lines 36-42). No orphan nodes.

All required components present with correct C4 IDs. Minor issue: vault-agent and nomad-client wrapped in Container_Boundary labeled Infrastructure Services (line 21) implies they are internal to llm-switch system boundary, but they are actually external cluster services. Should use Container_Ext or be outside the boundary.

Valid Nomad HCL with exact GPU syntax `gpu = 1` (line 111), Consul health check at /health/ready with interval 10s/timeout 3s (lines 82-84), and Vault agent config with token_renewal = true (line 133) and proper ACL roles. Minor issue: Comment on line 110 says 8MB but should say 8GB - actual value 8192 is correct.

Complete OpenAPI 3.0 specification (lines 171-686). Authentication: X-API-Key header (line 190), OAuth2 Bearer tokens (lines 191-198). Rate limiting headers: X-RateLimit-Limit (line 360), X-RateLimit-Remaining (line 364), X-RateLimit-Reset (line 368). Complete curl examples for GET /v1/models (line 692), POST /v1/chat/completions success (line 699), 400 error (line 715), 401 error (line 731), 403 error (line 746), 429 error (line 762), 500 error (line 781), 503 error (line 791), POST /v1/embeddings (line 807), DELETE /v1/models (line 850). All HTTP status codes documented with specific error message formats (lines 857-865).

Excellent compliance. Section 869 cites technology-choices.md with section numbers: Go 1.21+ (line 871), Docker base image gcr.io/distroless/static-debian11 (line 879), bifrost library v0.4.0+ (line 875), Orchestrator Model (line 884), Statistical Routing (line 889), Hardware Telemetry (line 894), Trace Accumulation (line 899), AutoResearch Loop (line 904), Nomad cluster deployment (line 910). Each choice includes rationale with performance benchmarks.

YAML frontmatter present with author (line 2), date (line 3), version (line 4). Heading hierarchy correct: H1 (line 7), H2 (lines 9,13,47,59,167,867,915,926,953,984), H3 (lines 688,773). All code blocks specify languages: mermaid (line 15), hcl (line 61), yaml (line 171), bash (lines 692,699,etc). Minor deduction: no explicit markdownlint verification shown.

Complete error handling: Timeouts - 30s LLM inference (line 929), 5s Consul discovery (line 930), 10s Vault operations (line 931). Retry logic - 3 attempts with exponential backoff 1s, 2s, 4s (lines 933-934), jitter mentioned (line 935). Circuit breaker - 5 failures in 30s triggers open state for 60s (lines 938-939), half-open described (line 940). Dead-letter queue - Redis sidecar configured (lines 943-952), PagerDuty integration via Vault webhook secret (line 945), alert threshold >10 entries in 5-minute window (line 946).

Complete security specifications: TLS 1.3 for all external communications (line 956) with cipher suite TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384 (line 957). mTLS for service mesh with certificate rotation every 24h (line 958). API key rotation procedure with 90-day max age (line 961). Vault secrets path structure /secret/c2/* (line 963) with proper ACL policies (lines 964-967). JWT expiration 15 minutes (line 970), refresh token rotation 24 hours (line 971).

Complete performance constraints: p99 latency SLA < 200ms for API responses under 1000 QPS load (line 987). Memory: 2GB container with OOMKilled prevention (line 992, 1005), CPU: 4000 millicores with burst capability to 6000mc (line 993), Concurrent connections: 100 per instance (line 998), Graceful degradation: load shedding at 80% CPU (line 1000). Additional clarification on 8GB container vs 2GB heap (lines 1002-1006).

overall_summary: Production-ready architecture document substantially exceeding sprint contract requirements. The Mermaid diagram validates successfully with all 7 required container nodes. Nomad job includes exact GPU syntax (gpu = 1), Consul health checks at /health/ready, and Vault token renewal. OpenAPI 3.0 specification is comprehensive with curl examples for all HTTP status codes (200,400,401,403,429,500,503). Technology choices properly cite technology-choices.md with Go 1.21+, gcr.io/distroless/static-debian11, and bifrost v0.4.0+. Error handling covers timeouts (30s/5s/10s), retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff), circuit breaker (5 failures in 30s), and DLQ with PagerDuty. Security includes TLS 1.3 with TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384, mTLS with 24h rotation, API key rotation (90-day), and Vault ACLs. Performance specifies p99 <200ms at 1000 QPS, 2GB memory, 4000m CPU, 100 concurrent connections, and 80% load shedding. Minor issues: (1) Infrastructure services incorrectly nested inside Container_Boundary implying internal rather than external (lines 21-25), and (2) typo in Nomad comment says 8MB instead of 8GB (line 110), though value 8192 is correct.
